title: Coal India MT Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 276 Management Trainee Posts
short_info: Coal India Limited Management Trainee Mining Recruitment 2026: Get the latest CIL recruitment notification 2026 for 276 Management Trainee (Mining) vacancies through GATE 2025 under Coal India Limited (CIL), a Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Coal, Government of India. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 7th June 2026. Find CIL Management Trainee vacancies across India on the official website http://coalindia.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026” notifications for

important_dates.correction_date: Not applicable - no modifications allowed after submission
important_dates.documents verification (dv) & initial me: To be notified on CIL website (www.coalindia.in)

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 1,000/- + GST Rs. 180/- = Rs. 1,180/- (Rupees One Thousand One Hundred and Eighty only)
application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the post of Management Trainee (Mining) are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online only. CIL will not be responsible if a candidate deposits the fee in any wrong account. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are advised to verify their eligibility before applying.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit is 30 years as on 30th April 2026 for General (UR) and EWS category candidates. Category-wise relaxations are available as specified below. The maximum age of any applicant on the crucial date (30th April 2026) shall not exceed 56 years under any circumstance. Departmental candidates of Coal India Limited or its Subsidiary companies are not subject to any age limit.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (07-06-2026). Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. A valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) is mandatory - GATE scores of any other year (prior to or after 2025) will not be considered valid for this recruitment. The qualifying degree must be from a University/Institute recognized by the appropriate statutory authority in India and must be a regular full-time course. | Candidates having completed their degree or passed their final semester examination as on the cut-off date are eligible. In case of any dispute regarding admissibility of any particular qualification, the decision of the Chairman, Coal India Limited shall be final and binding. | Educational Qualification

salary_details.pay_scale: E-1 Grade: Rs. 60,000 - 1,80,000/- (Initial Basic Pay: Rs. 60,000/- per month during training period)

selection_process: Shortlisting Based on GATE-2025 Score/Marks in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN); shortlisted category-wise in ratio of 1:3 (3 candidates per vacancy) in order of merit
Documents Verification (DV) Shortlisted candidates will be called for Documents Verification; intimated via CIL website and registered email ID only
Initial Medical Examination (IME) By the company's Medical Committee as per CIL Medical Attendance Rules; Medical Committee decision is final and binding
Offer of Appointment Issued only after successful completion of DV & IME
1st Tie-Break Candidate scoring higher percentage marks / CGPA in the minimum eligible qualification (Mining Engineering degree) will be placed higher in the merit list
2nd Tie-Break Seniority of age (older candidate preferred) if tie persists after 1st tie-break
Training Period 1-year training-cum-probation period; on successful completion, service confirmed in E-1 Grade as Officer (Mining)
Posting Anywhere in India including Subsidiary companies and Coalfield areas; candidates must submit 3 posting preferences but final posting is as per CIL Management decision

Service Agreement Bond Minimum service of 60 months from date of joining; Bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs + applicable GST; Rs. 5,000/- per month deducted from salary towards bond money, refunded without interest after 60 months

The selection process for CIL Management Trainee (Mining) Recruitment 2026 is based entirely on the valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN). There is no separate written examination. Eligible candidates will be shortlisted category-wise in the ratio of 1:3 (3 candidates per vacancy) in order of merit based on GATE-2025 Scores/Marks. The final merit list will be prepared on the basis of GATE-2025 Scores/Marks only. An Offer of Appointment will be issued only after successful completion of Documents Verification (DV) and Initial Medical Examination (IME).
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the CIL official website www.coalindia.in under the section "Career with CIL >>> Jobs at Coal India." Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 08-05-2026 (10:00 AM) to 07-06-2026 (6:00 PM). Candidates are advised not to wait until the last date and to register and submit their application well within time. No modifications are allowed after the online application form is submitted. If more than one application is received from a candidate, the most recent/current application will be considered as final.

All documents must be uploaded as self-attested scanned copies - scanned documents that are not clear and legible may result in rejection of candidature. Candidates must have an active email ID and mobile number valid for at least one year - no change in email ID or mobile number will be allowed after submission. For queries, candidates may refer to the FAQs on CIL's website or write to [email protected].
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Recent passport size colour photograph (not older than 3 weeks, JPG/JPEG format)
Signature with black ink pen (JPG/JPEG format)
Matriculation/Secondary Board Certificate/Admit Card/Birth Certificate (age proof)
Mark sheet of graduation (percentage proof); CGPA/GPA/CPI conversion certificate issued by University/Institute (if applicable)
OBC (NCL) / SC / ST Caste Certificate in prescribed format issued on or after 01.04.2026 (if applicable)
Income & Asset Certificate (EWS) issued by competent authority based on income for 2025-26, valid for 2026-27 (if applicable)
J&K Domicile Certificate in prescribed format issued by competent authority (if applicable)
Government/PSU/Autonomous body employees must submit NOC from their current employer at the time of DV & IME, or a proper relieving order at the time of joining.
Apply Online at: https://cdn.digialm.com/EForms/configuredHtml/1258/100589/Index.html (Career with CIL > Jobs at Coal India)
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals with a valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) are eligible to apply. Qualifying degree must be regular full-time from a University/Institute recognized by appropriate statutory authority in India. No hard copy applications will be accepted - online submission only via CIL website. Application fee is non-refundable; applications submitted by unqualified candidates will be rejected. No modifications are allowed after online application is submitted - discrepancies between online data and original documents may lead to rejection. GATE scores of any year other than GATE-2025 are not valid and will not be considered. OBC (Creamy Layer) candidates must apply under General (UR) category and are not entitled to OBC (NCL) concession/reservation. OBC (NCL) caste certificate must be issued on or after 01.04.2026 in the latest prescribed format for Central Government/PSU appointment purpose. Government/PSU employees must submit NOC/relieving letter from current employer at DV & IME stage or at the time of joining - no pay protection or bond transfer benefits on joining. Selected candidates must execute a service agreement bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs + GST and serve for a minimum of 60 months from date of joining. Candidates must keep their registered email ID and mobile number active for at least one year - no changes will be allowed. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Any modifications/amendments/corrigendum in the advertisement will be published only on CIL's website www.coalindia.in. All disputes related to this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Kolkata only. CIL reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify/alter the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. The decision of the Chairman, CIL on all matters relating to eligibility, acceptance/rejection of applications, selection, and posting is final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is Coal India Management Trainee Mining Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Coal India Limited (CIL) has released Advertisement No. 01/2026 dated 05 May 2026 for recruitment of 276 Management Trainees (Mining) in E‑1 Grade based on GATE‑2025 scores.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for CIL Management Trainee (Mining) 2026?
faq.answer: There are 276 vacancies for Management Trainee (Mining), distributed as UR 114, EWS 27, SC 41, ST 20, and OBC (NCL) 74, and the number may increase or decrease as per CIL’s requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for Coal India MT Mining Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application portal opens on 08 May 2026 (10:00 AM) and the last date to apply online is 07 June 2026 (up to 6:00 PM), while the advertisement is dated 05 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for CIL Management Trainee (Mining) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a full‑time Degree in Mining Engineering with at least 60% marks (55% for SC/ST) from a recognized University/Institute and must possess a valid GATE‑2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN).

faq.question: Q5. Is GATE compulsory for Coal India MT Mining 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, GATE‑2025 in Mining Engineering (Paper Code MN) is mandatory, and GATE scores of any other year will not be considered for this Management Trainee (Mining) recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Coal India Management Trainee Mining Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 30 years as on 30 April 2026 for UR/EWS candidates, with relaxations of 3 years for OBC (NCL), 5 years for SC/ST, additional relaxations for J&K domicile and Ex‑Servicemen as per Government rules, and no upper age limit for departmental CIL employees (overall absolute cap 56 years).

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary or pay scale for CIL Management Trainee (Mining)?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed in E‑1 Grade with a pay scale of Rs. 60,000 – 1,80,000, and an initial basic pay of Rs. 60,000 per month during the training period as per the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Coal India MT Mining Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection is purely based on GATE‑2025 scores, with candidates shortlisted category‑wise in a 1:3 ratio for Document Verification (DV) and Initial Medical Examination (IME), and the final merit list is prepared only on GATE‑2025 scores without any separate written test.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for Coal India Management Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC (Creamy and Non‑Creamy Layer) and EWS candidates must pay Rs. 1,000 + Rs. 180 GST = Rs. 1,180 as a non‑refundable application fee, while SC/ST candidates and employees of CIL and its subsidiaries are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for Coal India Management Trainee Mining Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates have to apply online through the CIL official website [coalindia.in] → “Career with CIL” → “Jobs at Coal India”, complete registration, fill the MT (Mining) application form, upload required documents and photo/signature, pay the fee online (if applicable), and submit the form before 07 June 2026 (6:00 PM); no hard‑copy application is accepted and no changes are allowed after final submission.
